lunarcycle.moon.normal.name: Normal Moon
lunarcycle.moon.normal.message: A quiet night under a plain moon.
lunarcycle.moon.azure.name: Azure Moon
lunarcycle.moon.azure.message: The night glimmers with a brilliant blue light. Shiny Pokémon are more common tonight...
lunarcycle.moon.amethyst.name: Amethyst Moon
lunarcycle.moon.amethyst.message: A deep violet glow fills the sky. Rare Pokémon emerge from the shadows...
lunarcycle.moon.golden.name: Golden Moon
lunarcycle.moon.golden.message: The moon shines like pure gold. Your Pokémon will grow stronger tonight...
lunarcycle.moon.emerald.name: Emerald Moon
lunarcycle.moon.emerald.message: A verdant light washes over the land. Grass and Water Pokémon thrive in this glow...
lunarcycle.moon.scarlet.name: Scarlet Moon
lunarcycle.moon.scarlet.message: The sky burns red. Fire and Fighting Pokémon are empowered by the crimson light...
lunarcycle.moon.silver.name: Silver Moon
lunarcycle.moon.silver.message: A pale silver radiance drifts across the night. Fortune favors those who venture out...
lunarcycle.moon.dark.name: Dark Moon
lunarcycle.moon.dark.message: The moon is swallowed by darkness. Ghost and Dark Pokémon lurk in greater numbers...
lunarcycle.dawn.message: The moon fades. Its power wanes until the next special night...
